import json
import logging
from dataclasses import dataclass, field
from typing import List

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)


@dataclass
class Order:
    order_id: int
    customer_id: int
    line_items: List[dict] = field(default_factory=list)
    payment_info: dict = field(default_factory=dict)
    shipping_address: dict = field(default_factory=dict)


@dataclass
class Customer:
    customer_id: int
    name: str
    orders: List[Order] = field(default_factory=list)
    preferences: dict = field(default_factory=dict)


def process_order(customer: Customer, order: Order):
    logger.debug("Processing order: %s", json.dumps(order.__dict__, default=str))
    logger.debug("Customer details: %s", json.dumps(customer.__dict__, default=str))
    logger.debug("Full state: %s", json.dumps(
        {"customer": customer.__dict__, "order": order.__dict__}, default=str
    ))
